events.title: From draft to done: agentic Copilot in Excel, Word, and PowerPoint
events.titleJa: 下書きから完成まで: Excel、Word、PowerPoint のエージェント Copilot
events.titleEn: From draft to done: agentic Copilot in Excel, Word, and PowerPoint
events.summary: Real work is iterative—context shifts, edits pile up, and version sprawl happens fast. Microsoft 365 Copilot is built for that reality. Copilot is now agentic, collaborating with you to take multi-step, app-native actions directly in Excel, Word, and PowerPoint so you can move w...
